title: VEX-8
summary: Hard-surface mechanical spider asset — articulated leg rigging, industrial panel breakup, and weathered metal detailing built for a sci-fi creature portfolio piece.
problem: Design a believable eight-legged mech with readable joint hierarchy, balanced silhouette, and material contrast across worn steel, cables, and mechanical internals.
approach: Blocked leg proportions and body massing in Blender, refined hard-surface panels and joint mechanics, then textured metal wear, edge grime, and accent lights in Substance before final beauty lighting.
outcome: Hero beauty render, process frames, and supporting angles packaged for asset design portfolio and client pitch use.

process.caption: Reference board for mech spider silhouette, joint hierarchy, and hard-surface panel language.
Leg proportions, body massing, and panel breakup blocked in 3D.
